landmarks.main_glacis: named feature plate with its own measured plane and world_corners
landmarks.left_shoulder: closed shoulder solid from measured side feature bounds
landmarks.right_shoulder: closed shoulder solid from measured side feature bounds
landmarks.front_face: closed front/lower face feature, not endpoint wall extrusion
landmarks.deck_transition: closed upper/deck transition feature behind socket

hatch.reason: feature decomposition must pass before hatch detail
